title: knautia dipsacifolia subsp. pocutica
intro: Knautia dipsacifolia subsp. pocutica, also known as mountain bluet, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting oxidative stress, and supporting immune function. Knautia dipsacifolia subsp. pocutica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
